title: The sizeof and alignof operator should be avoided with operands of a void type
description: The "sizeof" and "alignof" operator should not be used with operands of a "void" typeAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityBuglock-inWhy is this an issue?Although some compilers will allow it, the use ofsizeofandalignofwith arguments that have avoidtype is forbidden by both the C and C++ standards.Noncompliant code examplevoid fun() { void* p; sizeof(*p); // Noncompliant sizeof(void); // Noncompliant alignof(*p); // Noncompliant alignof(void); // Noncompliant }Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All rights reserved.Privacy Policy|Cookie Policy|Terms of Use
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

checks.message: The sizeof and alignof operator should be avoided with operands of a void type
